name: @chuks/pcre
description: Pure-Chuks PCRE-style backtracking regular expressions — lookahead, lookbehind, backreferences, named groups, lazy quantifiers — with position-returning matches. The advanced engine Chuks's RE2-based std/regex can't be (mirrors how Go ships RE2 in std and leaves regexp2 as a package).
author: Chuks Team
